formulas.label: eq0014
formulas.latex: \begin{aligned} & & \underset{u_{1}_{i , j , k} , u_{2}_{i , j , k}}{\text{min}} \underset{i}{\sum} \underset{j}{\sum} \underset{k}{\sum} \left\{p_{k} e_{i , j , k}^{2} + q_{k} \left(e_{i , j , k} - e_{i - 1 , j , k}\right) ^{2} + y_{k} \left(u_{1}_{i , j , k}^{2} + u_{2}_{i , j , k}^{2}\right)\right\} \\ & & \text{s}.\text{t}. e_{i , j + 1 , k} = e_{i , j , k} + \alpha_{i , j + 1 , k} \left(e_{i , j + 1 , k} - e_{i - 1 , j + 1 , k}\right) + u_{1}_{i , j , k} + u_{2}_{i , j , k} + w_{i , j , k} , \\ & & e_{i , j , n} - e_{i^{'} , j^{'} , m} = l_{j , m , n} - \left(T_{i , j , n} - T_{i^{'} , j^{'} , m}\right) , \left(m , n\right) \in \mathbf{\mathcal{E}} , \\ & & e_{i , j , k} - e_{i - 1 , j , k} \geq t_{min , k} - H_{k} , \\ & & u_{1}_{min , k} \leq u_{1}_{i , j , k} \leq u_{1}_{max , k} , \\ & & u_{2}_{min , k} \leq u_{2}_{i , j , k} \leq u_{2}_{max , k} .\end{aligned}

formulas.label: eq0017
formulas.latex: \begin{matrix} & & J_{k} \left(j\right) = \sum_{i = 0}^{M - 1} \left\{\right. \left(e_{k} \left(j + i + 1\right)\right)^{T} P_{k} e_{k} \left(j + i + 1\right) + \left(e_{k} \left(j + i + 1\right) - e_{k} \left(j + i\right)\right) ^{T} Q_{k} \left(e_{k} \left(j + i + 1\right) - e_{k} \left(j + i\right)\right) \\ & & + \left(u_{1}_{k} \left(j + i\right)\right)^{T} Y_{k} u_{1}_{k} \left(j + i\right) + \left(u_{2}_{k} \left(j + i\right)\right)^{T} Y_{k} u_{2}_{k} \left(j + i\right) \left.\right\} .\end{matrix}

formulas.latex: \begin{matrix} & & \underset{u_{k} \left(j + i\right) , i = 0 , 1 , 2 , \ldots , M - 1}{\text{min}} \sum_{k = 1}^{Z} J_{k} \left(j\right) \\ & & \text{s}.\text{t}. e_{k} \left(j + i + 1\right) = A_{k} \left(j + i\right) e_{k} \left(j + i\right) + B_{k} \left(j + i\right) u_{1}_{k} \left(j + i\right) + B_{k} \left(j + i\right) u_{2}_{k} \left(j + i\right) + B_{k} \left(j + i\right) w_{k} \left(j + i\right) , \\ & & E_{m , n} e_{n} \left(j + i\right) - \left(\bar{E}\right)_{m , n} e_{m} \left(j + i\right) = L_{m , n} - T_{m , n} , \left(m , n\right) \in \mathbf{\mathcal{E}} , \\ & & e_{k} \left(j + i - 1\right) - e_{k} \left(j + i\right) \leq \left(H_{k} - t_{min , k}\right) I_{N_{k} \times 1} , \\ & & u_{1}_{min , k} I_{N_{k} \times 1} \leq u_{1}_{k} \left(j + i\right) \leq u_{1}_{max , k} I_{N_{k} \times 1} , \\ & & u_{2}_{min , k} I_{N_{k} \times 1} \leq u_{2}_{k} \left(j + i\right) \leq u_{2}_{max , k} I_{N_{k} \times 1} , k = 1 , 2 \ldots , Z .\end{matrix}

formulas.label: eq0019
formulas.latex: \begin{matrix}L = \sum_{k = 1}^{Z} J_{k} \left(j\right) + \sum_{i = 0}^{M - 1} \underset{\left(m , n\right) \in \mathbf{\mathcal{E}}}{\sum} \lambda_{m , n} \left(j + i\right) \left(E_{m , n} e_{n} \left(j + i\right) - \left(\bar{E}\right)_{m , n} e_{m} \left(j + i\right) - L_{m , n} + T_{m , n}\right) .\end{matrix}

formulas.label: eq0020
formulas.latex: \begin{matrix} & & \underset{\lambda_{m , n} \left(j\right)}{\text{max}} \underset{u_{k} \left(j + i\right) , i = 0 , 1 , 2 , \ldots , M - 1}{\text{min}} L \\ & & \text{s}.\text{t}. e_{k} \left(j + i + 1\right) = A_{k} \left(j + i\right) e_{k} \left(j + i\right) + B_{k} \left(j + i\right) u_{1}_{k} \left(j + i\right) + B_{k} \left(j + i\right) u_{2}_{k} \left(j + i\right) + B_{k} \left(j + i\right) w_{k} \left(j + i\right) , \\ & & e_{k} \left(j + i - 1\right) - e_{k} \left(j + i\right) \leq \left(H_{k} - t_{min , k}\right) I_{N_{k} \times 1} , \\ & & u_{1}_{min , k} I_{N_{k} \times 1} \leq u_{1}_{k} \left(j + i\right) \leq u_{1}_{max , k} I_{N_{k} \times 1} , \\ & & u_{2}_{min , k} I_{N_{k} \times 1} \leq u_{2}_{k} \left(j + i\right) \leq u_{2}_{max , k} I_{N_{k} \times 1} , k = 1 , 2 \ldots , Z .\end{matrix}

formulas.label: eq0021
formulas.latex: \begin{matrix} & & \underset{u_{k} \left(j + i\right) , i = 0 , 1 , 2 , \ldots , M - 1}{\text{min}} L_{k} = J_{k} \left(j\right) + \sum_{i = 0}^{M - 1} \left(\right. \underset{m}{\sum} \lambda_{m , k} \left(j + i\right) \left(- \left(\bar{E}\right)_{m , k} e_{k} \left(j + i\right)\right) \\ & & + \underset{n}{\sum} \lambda_{k , n} \left(j + i\right) \left(E_{k , n} e_{k} \left(j + i\right) - L_{k , n} + T_{k , n}\right) \left.\right) \\ & & \text{s}.\text{t}. e_{k} \left(j + i + 1\right) = A_{k} \left(j + i\right) e_{k} \left(j + i\right) + B_{k} \left(j + i\right) u_{1}_{k} \left(j + i\right) + B_{k} \left(j + i\right) u_{2}_{k} \left(j + i\right) \\ & & + B_{k} \left(j + i\right) w_{k} \left(j + i\right) , \\ & & e_{k} \left(j + i - 1\right) - e_{k} \left(j + i\right) \leq \left(H_{k} - t_{min , k}\right) I_{N_{k} \times 1} , \\ & & u_{1}_{min , k} I_{N_{k} \times 1} \leq u_{1}_{k} \left(j + i\right) \leq u_{1}_{max , k} I_{N_{k} \times 1} , \\ & & u_{2}_{min , k} I_{N_{k} \times 1} \leq u_{2}_{k} \left(j + i\right) \leq u_{2}_{max , k} I_{N_{k} \times 1} , k = 1 , 2 \ldots , Z .\end{matrix}

formulas.label: eq0024
formulas.latex: \begin{matrix}\left(1 - \alpha_{i , j + 1 , k}\right) e_{i , j + 1 , k} = e_{i , j , k} - \alpha_{i , j + 1 , k} e_{i - 1 , j + 1 , k} + u_{1}_{i , j , k} + u_{2}_{i , j , k} + w_{i , j , k} .\end{matrix}

formulas.label: eq0025

formulas.label: eq0026
formulas.latex: \begin{aligned}e_{k} \left(j + 1\right) & = & \begin{bmatrix} \begin{matrix}\frac{- \alpha_{j - 1 , 1 , k}}{1 - \alpha_{j - 1 , 1 , k}} & 0 & 0 & 0 & \hdots \\ \frac{1}{1 - \alpha_{j - 2 , 2 , k}} & \frac{- \alpha_{j - 2 , 2 , k}}{1 - \alpha_{j - 2 , 2 , k}} & 0 & 0 & \hdots \\ & \hdots & \hdots & \hdots & \\ 0 & \hdots & 0 & \frac{1}{1 - \alpha_{j - N_{k} , N_{k} , k}} & \frac{- \alpha_{j - N_{k} , N_{k} , k}}{1 - \alpha_{N_{k} , k}}\end{matrix} \end{bmatrix} e_{k} \left(j\right) \\ & & + \begin{bmatrix} \begin{matrix}\frac{1}{1 - \alpha_{j - 1 , 1 , k}} & 0 & 0 & \hdots \\ 0 & \frac{1}{1 - \alpha_{j - 2 , 2 , k}} & 0 & \hdots \\ & \hdots & \hdots & \hdots \\ 0 & \hdots & \hdots & \frac{1}{1 - \alpha_{j - N_{k} , N_{k} , k}}\end{matrix} \end{bmatrix} \left(u_{1}_{k} \left(j\right) + u_{2}_{k} \left(j\right) + w_{k} \left(j\right)\right) .\end{aligned}

formulas.label: eq0028
formulas.latex: \begin{aligned} & & \left(F_{k} e_{k} \left(j\right) + \Phi_{k} \left(U_{1 k} + U_{2 k}\right)\right) ^{T} \bar{P} \left(F_{k} e_{k} \left(j\right) + \Phi_{k} \left(U_{1 k} + U_{2 k}\right)\right) \\ & & + \left(G_{1} \left(F_{k} e_{k} \left(j\right) + \Phi_{k} \left(U_{1 k} + U_{2 k}\right)\right) - G_{2}\right) ^{T} \bar{Q} \left(G_{1} \left(F_{k} e_{k} \left(j\right) + \Phi_{k} \left(U_{1 k} + U_{2 k}\right)\right) - G_{2}\right) \\ & & + U_{1 k}^{T} R_{k} U_{1 k} + U_{2 k}^{T} R_{k} U_{2 k} + \Lambda_{k} \left(F_{k} e_{k} \left(j\right) + \Phi_{k} \left(U_{1 k} + U_{2 k}\right)\right) - \sum_{i = 1}^{m - 1} \underset{n}{\sum} \lambda_{k , n} \left(j + i\right) \left(L_{k , n} - T_{k , n}\right) \\ & = & \left(U_{1 k} + U_{2 k}\right) ^{T} \left(\Phi_{k}^{T} \bar{P} \Phi_{k} + \Phi_{k}^{T} G_{1}^{T} \bar{Q} G_{1} \Phi_{k}\right) \left(U_{1 k} + U_{2 k}\right) + U_{1 k}^{T} R_{k} U_{1 k} + U_{2 k}^{T} R_{k} U_{2 k} \\ & & + 2 \left(U_{1 k} + U_{2 k}\right) ^{T} \left(\Phi_{k}^{T} \bar{P} F_{k} e_{k} \left(j\right) + \Phi_{k}^{T} G_{1}^{T} \bar{Q} G_{1} F_{k} e_{k} \left(j\right) - \Phi_{k}^{T} G_{1}^{T} \bar{Q} G_{2} + \frac{1}{2} \Phi_{k}^{T} \Lambda_{k}^{T}\right) + \Theta_{k} ,\end{aligned}
